auth.pending_approval_desc: Thank you for joining HomeFix. Our team is currently reviewing your documents. This usually takes 24-48 hours.

• NID photo (front & back)
• Profile photo
• Skill categories
auth.pending_notify_hint: You'll be notified once your application is reviewed
auth.skills_subtitle: Select the services you provide to residents

onboarding.slide1_desc: Find trusted professionals for all your home repair needs, from plumbing to electrical work.
onboarding.slide2_desc: Book a service in just 3 taps. Specify your issue, choose a time, and we'll do the rest.
onboarding.slide3_desc: Pay securely using bKash, Nagad, or cash after the service is completed to your satisfaction.
